_doc: Machine-readable lane->epic index the ops-monitor (scripts/ops-monitor-check.sh) reads with jq. Join key = epic_id; ready-count per lane = `br ready --parent <epic_id> --limit 0 --json`. A lane is KNOWN/resumable when gate is null or expired; GATED only when a non-null unexpired gate object is present. epic_id:null REQUIRES a non-null gate (the lane has no ready-bead source, so it can never spuriously fire the stall wake). Admiral-owned; captain updates on staffing. Update in the SAME action as any lane add/retask/park. Seed = active + on-deck + parked lanes only (DONE lanes are not staffing candidates).

lanes.label: codename:pilot
lanes.note: PHASE = TESTING (2026-07-02). Build epic hk-94c3t CLOSED + 4-reviewer-approved, but Pi has NEVER run live. Fresh mission (operator-greenlit): prove Pi live on a GPT model (openai/gpt-5.4-mini via openrouter) then feed scavenger beads. ONE gate = auth: use the FILE-KEY path (hk-sv3vg ~-expansion fix + daemon redeploy of that binary) so PI-040 passes without env-var-in-revive fragility. Canary = hk-nxjwo (throwaway) on pi-q. fork-bomb hk-9s5fx primary fix DONE (353fc3c1). Open: design epic hk-ag97p (P2); local-model base_url gap hk-z13jz (P2, DGX-Spark enabler, HELD for operator sandbox details).

lanes.label: codename:scavenger
lanes.note: PARKED 2026-07-02 (thufir wound down; codex paused). Standing serial orphan-backlog drainer (~110 ready P2/P3). ABOUT TO BECOME FUEL: scavenger beads are the load source for BOTH the Pi-testing lane (feed mechanical beads to pi-q on gpt-5.4-mini) and remote (route to gb-mbp). Un-park/re-route per operator alignment on fresh missions.
